subcodes.first_line: The Book from the presence of the All-Merciful unto him who hath attained unto the Kawthar of life in days wherein those on earth have risen in opposition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی الرحمن الی من فاز بکوثر الحیوان فی ایام فیها اعترض من فی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @proclamation to the people of the world, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
